title: oberna suffrutescens
intro: Oberna suffrutescens, also known as the African firebush, is a plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oberna suffrutescens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
